mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_accident_claim WHERE claim_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_accident_claim ( claim_id, status, worker_name, worker_ssn, worker_phone, worker_address, worker_job_type, worker_join_date, worker_dept, company_name, company_rep_name, company_biz_no, company_address, company_phone, company_industry, company_workers_count, disease_name, disease_code, onset_date, diagnosis_date, exposure_period, exposure_factor, work_history, hospital_name, hospital_dept, treatment_start_date, treatment_end_date, treatment_type, applicant_name, applicant_relation, apply_date, notes, deleted, created_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{claimId}, #{status}, #{workerName}, #{workerSsn}, #{workerPhone}, #{workerAddress}, #{workerJobType}, #{workerJoinDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workerDept}, #{companyName}, #{companyRepName}, #{companyBizNo}, #{companyAddress}, #{companyPhone}, #{companyIndustry}, #{companyWorkersCount}, #{diseaseName}, #{diseaseCode}, #{onsetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{diagnosisDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{exposurePeriod}, #{exposureFactor}, #{workHistory}, #{hospitalName}, #{hospitalDept}, #{treatmentStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{treatmentEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{treatmentType}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantRelation}, #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes}, 0, #{createdBy}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_accident_claim SET worker_name = #{workerName}, worker_ssn = #{workerSsn}, worker_phone = #{workerPhone}, worker_address = #{workerAddress}, worker_job_type = #{workerJobType}, worker_join_date = #{workerJoinDate,jdbcType=DATE}, worker_dept = #{workerDept}, company_name = #{companyName}, company_rep_name = #{companyRepName}, company_biz_no = #{companyBizNo}, company_address = #{companyAddress}, company_phone = #{companyPhone}, company_industry = #{companyIndustry}, company_workers_count = #{companyWorkersCount}, disease_name = #{diseaseName}, disease_code = #{diseaseCode}, onset_date = #{onsetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, diagnosis_date = #{diagnosisDate,jdbcType=DATE}, exposure_period = #{exposurePeriod}, exposure_factor = #{exposureFactor}, work_history = #{workHistory}, hospital_name = #{hospitalName}, hospital_dept = #{hospitalDept}, treatment_start_date = #{treatmentStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, treatment_end_date = #{treatmentEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, treatment_type = #{treatmentType}, applicant_name = #{applicantName}, applicant_relation = #{applicantRelation}, apply_date = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_accident_claim SET status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_accident_claim SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
